title: Delay notification to a specific time of day

posts.author: Jakesmonday (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There guys!.

I am looking to have the notification created in an automation to be sent to a user at a particular time of day.

Ie. when an automation runs, it holds the notification until that time is reached and then send it to the user.

Has anyone achieved this?

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
You may use the automation recipe:
“Every time period, notify someone.”
When clicking on “Every time period”, you will be able to set the particular time of day.

posts.author: FredBaker (Integrated Human | Authorized Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Hezibo This will send a notification at a given time period, but the notification wouldnt be attached to a given automation, correct?

@Jakesmonday there is an ‘after a while’ clause on some automations. Maybe you could build the automation in the create automation builder with the after a while notify someone clause.

I’m not sure what specific automation you are using.
